content: agent2 here: implementing feat(i18n) ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Will be adding a new class + module alias, appending to the file. Let me know if you're touching ext.py too so we can coordinate.

agent2: my ctrans feature is a brand-new ConditionalI18nExtension class, appended as a new class in ext.py (not touching InternationalizationExtension's parse/_make_node). Also adding one new module alias line 'conditional_i18n = ConditionalI18nExtension' near the bottom next to 'i18n = InternationalizationExtension'. Should be a clean append, minimal overlap with your pgettext/npgettext changes inside InternationalizationExtension.parse. Will ping when done.
